<click:open_url:'https://builtbybit.com/resources/fake-player-plugin.98704/'><#0079FF><underlined>BuiltByBit</underlined></#0079FF></click>\n<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>" update-beta: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <bold><#FF9500>ʙᴇᴛᴀ ᴠᴇʀꜱɪᴏɴ</#FF9500></bold> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>\n <gray>Running <dark_gray>: <#FF9500>v{current}</#FF9500> <dark_gray>(<#FF9500>ʙᴇᴛᴀ</#FF9500><dark_gray>)\n <gray>Stable <dark_gray>: <#0079FF>v{latest}</#0079FF>\n <gray>Download <dark_gray>: <click:open_url:'https://modrinth.com/plugin/fake-player-plugin-(fpp)'><#0079FF><underlined>Modrinth</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/fake-player-plugin-fpp.133572/'><#0079FF><underlined>SpigotMC</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://hangar.papermc.io/Pepe-tf/FakePlayerPlugin'><#0079FF><underlined>PaperMC</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://builtbybit.com/resources/fake-player-plugin.98704/'><#0079FF><underlined>BuiltByBit</underlined></#0079FF></click>\n<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>" update-up-to-date: "{prefix}<#66CC66>Plugin is up to date</#66CC66> <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>v{current}</#0079FF><dark_gray>)" update-failed: "{prefix}<gray>ᴄᴏᴜʟᴅ ɴᴏᴛ ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ꜰᴏʀ ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇꜱ."
# In-game compatibility warning shown to admins when the server/runtime is restricted # compatibility-header — title line prepended to the per-issue list # compatibility-not-paper — server is not PaperMC | {version} detected server version # compatibility-version-old — MC version too old | {version} detected, {required} minimum # compatibility-no-mannequin — physical body rendering unsupported | {version} detected, {required} minimum compatibility-warning: "{prefix}<white>Not fully supported — some features disabled.</white>" compatibility-header: "{prefix}<red>⚠ <bold>Compatibility Issues Detected</bold> — some features are disabled:" compatibility-not-paper: "{prefix}<red> • Not running PaperMC <gray>(detected: <white>{version}</white><gray>) — switch to Paper." compatibility-version-old: "{prefix}<red> • Server version <white>{version}</white> is below required <white>{required}</white> — please update." compatibility-no-mannequin: "{prefix}<red> • Physical bot bodies require Paper <white>{required}</white> or newer — please update your server."
# ── Freeze ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name | {count} — number of bots (all) freeze-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp freeze <bot|all> [on|off]</#0079FF><gray>." freeze-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." freeze-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>."
# ── Spawn cooldown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {seconds} — seconds remaining on cooldown spawn-cooldown: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴡᴀɪᴛ <white>{seconds}s<red> ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴɪɴɢ ᴀɡᴀɪɴ."
# ── Rank (LuckPerms group assignment) ───────────────────────────────────────── # {bot} — bot display name # {group} — LuckPerms group name # {count} — number of bots assigned rank-no-luckperms: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴꜱᴛᴀʟʟᴇᴅ ᴏʀ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ." rank-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank <set|random|clear|list></#0079FF><gray>." rank-set-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank set <bot> <group></#0079FF><gray>." rank-random-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank random <group> <count|all></#0079FF><gray>." rank-clear-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank clear <bot></#0079FF><gray>." rank-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." rank-group-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ <white>{group}<red> ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ." rank-invalid-count: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴄᴏᴜɴᴛ. ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴇɴᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴠᴇ ɴᴜᴍʙᴇʀ ᴏʀ 'all'." rank-no-bots: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." rank-set-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀꜱꜱɪɢɴᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ <white>{group}<gray>." rank-random-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴀꜱꜱɪɢɴᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <white>{group}<gray>." rank-random-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ {count} ʙᴏᴛꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀꜱꜱɪɢɴᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <white>{group}<gray>." rank-clear-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <gray>ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴇꜰᴀᴜʟᴛ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ." rank-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ʙᴏᴛ ʀᴀɴᴋꜱ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ<dark_gray>):" rank-list-entry-custom: " <dark_gray>• <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>→ <white>{group}" rank-list-entry-default: " <dark_gray>• <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>→ <gray>(ᴅᴇꜰᴀᴜʟᴛ)"
# ── Alert (cross-server broadcast) ──────────────────────────────────────────── # {message} — the alert text alert-received: "{prefix}<red><bold>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ<reset> <dark_gray>» <white>{message}" alert-sent: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ ʙʀᴏᴀᴅᴄᴀꜱᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀꜱ</#0079FF><gray>." alert-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp alert <message></#0079FF><gray>."

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ · language/en.yml # English language file — edit and run /fpp reload to apply changes. # # Colour format : MiniMessage tags # Named colours : <red>, <gray>, <white>, <dark_gray>, <yellow> … # Hex colours : <#0079FF>text</#0079FF> # Decorations : <bold>, <italic>, <underlined>, <strikethrough> # Reset : <reset> # Placeholders : {placeholder} — see each entry for available ones # # ⚠ Keys marked "INTERNAL — do not edit" are used by the plugin's layout # engine. Changing them will break formatting. # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Plugin prefix — prepended to all [FPP] messages ────────────────────────── # Feel free to change the colour/text, but keep it short. prefix: "<dark_gray>[<#0079FF>ꜰᴘᴘ</#0079FF><dark_gray>]<reset> "
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # INTERNAL LAYOUT STRINGS — do not remove or rename these keys. # You may adjust colours/characters but keep the structure intact. # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Horizontal rule used in headers and footers divider: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Help menu — INTERNAL (placeholders {cmd}, {args}, {desc} required) help-header: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>" help-entry: " <#0079FF>/{cmd}</#0079FF><gray> {args} <dark_gray>— <white>{desc}" help-footer: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Plugin info screen (/fpp bare) — INTERNAL header line info-screen-header: " <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray>· <gray>ꜰᴘᴘ"
# Modrinth page — URL is hardcoded in the plugin; only the label is shown to players modrinth-label: "ᴍᴏᴅʀɪɴᴛʜ"
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # PLAYER-FACING MESSAGES — safe to edit freely # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Generic errors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── no-permission: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴏ ᴛʜɪꜱ." unknown-command: "{prefix}<red>ᴜɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ ꜱᴜʙ-ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/{0} ʜᴇʟᴘ</#0079FF><gray> ꜰᴏʀ ᴀ ʟɪꜱᴛ." player-only: "{prefix}<red>ᴏɴʟʏ ᴀ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴄᴀɴ ʀᴜɴ ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ." invalid-number: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ɴᴜᴍʙᴇʀ. ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴇɴᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴠᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇɢᴇʀ."
# ── Spawn ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {count} — number of bots spawned # {total} — total bots now active # {name} — custom bot name (name-taken / invalid-name errors) # {max} — max bot limit (max-reached error) # {limit} — personal limit (user-limit-reached error) spawn-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ꜱᴜᴍᴍᴏɴᴇᴅ<gray>. <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{total}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ<dark_gray>)" spawn-max-reached: "{prefix}<red>ᴍᴀx ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{max}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛꜱ<dark_gray>)<red>. ᴅᴇʟᴇᴛᴇ ꜱᴏᴍᴇ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ." spawn-user-limit-reached: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ'ᴠᴇ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀʟ ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{limit}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ)<dark_gray>)<red>." spawn-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/fpp spawn [amount] [--name <name>]</#0079FF><gray>." spawn-invalid-name: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ <white>1–16 <gray>ᴄʜᴀʀꜱ <dark_gray>(<white>ʟᴇᴛᴛᴇʀꜱ<gray>, <white>ᴅɪɡɪᴛꜱ<gray>, <white>_<dark_gray>)<gray>." spawn-name-taken: "{prefix}<red>ᴀ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name} <red>ɪꜱ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." spawn-no-names-left: "{prefix}<red>ᴀʟʟ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘᴏᴏʟ ᴀʀᴇ ɪɴ ᴜꜱᴇ. <gray>ʀᴇᴅᴜᴄᴇ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴏʀ ᴀᴅᴅ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ." # Console-specific spawn errors # {world} — the world name that was not found spawn-console-no-world: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ ɪꜱ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ — ᴄᴀɴɴᴏᴛ ᴅᴇᴛᴇʀᴍɪɴᴇ ᴀ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴ ʟᴏᴄᴀᴛɪᴏɴ." spawn-world-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ '<white>{world}<red>' ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ ᴏʀ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ." spawn-invalid-coords: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴄᴏᴏʀᴅɪɴᴀᴛᴇꜱ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ ꜰᴏʀᴍᴀᴛ: <white>x,y,z <gray><dark_gray>(ᴇ.ɢ. <white>100,64,200<gray>)"
# ── Delete ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot name # {count} — bots deleted (delete all) delete-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-all: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-none: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." delete-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red> ᴡᴀꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ." # {count} — number of bots randomly despawned delete-random-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>."
# ── List ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── list-none: " <gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ."
# ── Bot broadcast messages ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name # {killer} — killer player name (bot-kill only) bot-join: "<yellow>{name} joined the game" bot-leave: "<yellow>{name} left the game" bot-kill: "<gray>{killer} <white>slain <gray>{name}"
# ── Swap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── swap-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ʙᴏᴛ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ʙᴏᴳ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ʙᴏᴛ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ʙᴏᴛ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap <on|off|status></#0079FF><gray>."
# ── Fake chat ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── chat-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <on|off|status></#0079FF><gray>."
# ── Info / database ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot or spawner name queried info-no-records: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʀᴇᴄᴏʀᴅꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{name}<red>." info-db-unavailable: "{prefix}<red>ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ ᴜɴᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ. ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢ ᴀɴᴅ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀ ʟᴏɡꜱ."
# ── Teleport ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot name tph-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴛᴇʟᴇᴘᴏʀᴛᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ʏᴏᴜ." tph-no-bots: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ." tph-specify-name: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪᴘʟᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ. <gray>ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪ꜕ʏ ᴏɴᴇ: <#0079FF>/fpp tph <botname></#0079FF>" tph-not-yours: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ᴏᴡɴ ᴀ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." tph-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." tph-failed: "{prefix}<red>ᴄᴏᴜʟᴅ ɴᴏᴛ ᴛᴇʟᴇᴘᴏʀᴛ <white>{name}<red> — ᴇɴᴛɪᴛʏ ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ." tp-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴛᴇʟᴇᴘᴏʀᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." tp-specify-name: "{prefix}<red>ᴍᴜʟᴛɪᴘʟᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ. <gray>ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪ꜕ʏ ᴏɴᴇ: <#0079FF>/fpp tp <botname></#0079FF>" tp-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." tp-failed: "{prefix}<red>ᴄᴏᴜʟᴅ ɴᴏᴛ ᴛᴇʟᴇᴘᴏʀᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>{name}<red> — ᴇɴᴛɪᴛʏ ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ."
# ── Update checker ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {current} — installed version # {latest} — latest version update-available: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <bold><#0079FF>ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ</#0079FF></bold> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>\n <gray>Installed <dark_gray>: <white>v{current}\n <gray>Latest <dark_gray>: <#0079FF>v{latest}</#0079FF>\n <gray>Download <dark_gray>: <click:open_url:'https://modrinth.com/plugin/fake-player-plugin-(fpp)'><#0079FF><underlined>Modrinth</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/fake-player-plugin-fpp.133572/'><#0079FF><underlined>SpigotMC</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://hangar.papermc.io/Pepe-tf/FakePlayerPlugin'><#0079FF><underlined>PaperMC</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://builtbybit.com/resources/fake-player-plugin.98704/'><#0079FF><underlined>BuiltByBit</underlined></#0079FF></click>\n<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>" update-beta: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <bold><#FF9500>ʙᴇᴛᴀ ᴠᴇʀꜱɪᴏɴ</#FF9500></bold> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>\n <gray>Running <dark_gray>: <#FF9500>v{current}</#FF9500> <dark_gray>(<#FF9500>ʙᴇᴛᴀ</#FF9500><dark_gray>)\n <gray>Stable <dark_gray>: <#0079FF>v{latest}</#0079FF>\n <gray>Download <dark_gray>: <click:open_url:'https://modrinth.com/plugin/fake-player-plugin-(fpp)'><#0079FF><underlined>Modrinth</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/fake-player-plugin-fpp.133572/'><#0079FF><underlined>SpigotMC</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://hangar.papermc.io/Pepe-tf/FakePlayerPlugin'><#0079FF><underlined>PaperMC</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>, <click:open_url:'https://builtbybit.com/resources/fake-player-plugin.98704/'><#0079FF><underlined>BuiltByBit</underlined></#0079FF></click>\n<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>" update-up-to-date: "{prefix}<#66CC66>Plugin is up to date</#66CC66> <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>v{current}</#0079FF><dark_gray>)" update-failed: "{prefix}<gray>ᴄᴏᴜʟᴅ ɴᴏᴛ ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ꜰᴏʀ ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇꜱ."
# In-game compatibility warning shown to admins when the server/runtime is restricted # compatibility-header — title line prepended to the per-issue list # compatibility-not-paper — server is not PaperMC | {version} detected server version # compatibility-version-old — MC version too old | {version} detected, {required} minimum # compatibility-no-mannequin — physical body rendering unsupported | {version} detected, {required} minimum compatibility-warning: "{prefix}<white>Not fully supported — some features disabled.</white>" compatibility-header: "{prefix}<red>⚠ <bold>Compatibility Issues Detected</bold> — some features are disabled:" compatibility-not-paper: "{prefix}<red> • Not running PaperMC <gray>(detected: <white>{version}</white><gray>) — switch to Paper." compatibility-version-old: "{prefix}<red> • Server version <white>{version}</white> is below required <white>{required}</white> — please update." compatibility-no-mannequin: "{prefix}<red> • Physical bot bodies require Paper <white>{required}</white> or newer — please update your server."
# ── Freeze ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name | {count} — number of bots (all) freeze-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp freeze <bot|all> [on|off]</#0079FF><gray>." freeze-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." freeze-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>."
# ── Spawn cooldown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {seconds} — seconds remaining on cooldown spawn-cooldown: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴡᴀɪᴛ <white>{seconds}s<red> ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴɪɴɢ ᴀɡᴀɪɴ."
# ── Rank (LuckPerms group assignment) ───────────────────────────────────────── # {bot} — bot display name # {group} — LuckPerms group name # {count} — number of bots assigned rank-no-luckperms: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴꜱᴛᴀʟʟᴇᴅ ᴏʀ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ." rank-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank <set|random|clear|list></#0079FF><gray>." rank-set-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank set <bot> <group></#0079FF><gray>." rank-random-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank random <group> <count|all></#0079FF><gray>." rank-clear-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank clear <bot></#0079FF><gray>." rank-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." rank-group-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ <white>{group}<red> ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ." rank-invalid-count: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴄᴏᴜɴᴛ. ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴇɴᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴠᴇ ɴᴜᴍʙᴇʀ ᴏʀ 'all'." rank-no-bots: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." rank-set-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀꜱꜱɪɢɴᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ <white>{group}<gray>." rank-random-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴀꜱꜱɪɢɴᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <white>{group}<gray>." rank-random-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ {count} ʙᴏᴛꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀꜱꜱɪɢɴᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <white>{group}<gray>." rank-clear-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <gray>ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴇꜰᴀᴜʟᴛ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ." rank-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ʙᴏᴛ ʀᴀɴᴋꜱ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ<dark_gray>):" rank-list-entry-custom: " <dark_gray>• <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>→ <white>{group}" rank-list-entry-default: " <dark_gray>• <#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>→ <gray>(ᴅᴇꜰᴀᴜʟᴛ)"
# ── Alert (cross-server broadcast) ──────────────────────────────────────────── # {message} — the alert text alert-received: "{prefix}<red><bold>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ<reset> <dark_gray>» <white>{message}" alert-sent: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ ʙʀᴏᴀᴅᴄᴀꜱᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀꜱ</#0079FF><gray>." alert-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp alert <message></#0079FF><gray>."

option.name: filePath
option.value: /plugin (snapshot).yml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: FakePlayerPlugin version: '1.3.0' main: me.bill.fakePlayerPlugin.FakePlayerPlugin api-version: '1.21' authors: [ El_Pepes ] description: Advanced Fake Player Spoofer for Paper 1.21+ | Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/plugin/fake-player-plugin-(fpp) softdepend: [ PlaceholderAPI, LuckPerms ]
commands: fpp: description: Fake Player Plugin main command usage: /fpp [sub-command] aliases: [ fakeplayer, fp ]
permissions:
# ── Admin wildcard ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Grants EVERYTHING — assign to owner / admin groups only. fpp.*: description: Grants access to all FPP commands and features (admin). default: op children: fpp.help: true fpp.spawn: true fpp.spawn.multiple: true fpp.spawn.name: true fpp.delete: true fpp.delete.all: true fpp.list: true fpp.chat: true fpp.swap: true fpp.reload: true fpp.info: true fpp.tp: true fpp.bypass.maxbots: true fpp.bypass.cooldown: true fpp.admin.migrate: true fpp.stats: true fpp.freeze: true fpp.user.*: true
# ── User wildcard ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # default: true → ALL players get user-tier access out of the box. # Use LuckPerms to negate it for specific groups if needed: # /lp group guest permission set fpp.user.* false fpp.user.*: description: > Grants all user-facing FPP commands to regular players (default: everyone). Includes: spawn (1-bot limit), /fpp tph, /fpp info (own bots only). Does NOT include admin commands (delete, reload, swap, chat, list, full-info, tp). default: true children: fpp.user.spawn: true fpp.user.tph: true fpp.user.info: true fpp.bot.1: true # default personal limit — 1 bot per player
# ── User commands ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fpp.user.spawn: description: > Spawn bots up to the player's personal bot limit. Limit is resolved from fpp.bot.<num> nodes (highest wins). Falls back to fake-player.user-bot-limit in config.yml (default: 1). Cannot use --name or spawn multiple bots (admin-only features). default: true
fpp.user.tph: description: > Teleport your own bot(s) to you with /fpp tph [botname]. Players can only tph bots they personally spawned. If you have 1 bot, botname is optional. If you have multiple bots, you must specify one by name. default: true
fpp.user.info: description: > View limited bot info with /fpp info [botname] — own bots only. Shows: world, coordinates, uptime. Does NOT show session history, database records, or other players' bots. default: true
# ── Bot limit nodes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Assign the highest node the player should be allowed. # The plugin scans fpp.bot.1 → fpp.bot.100 and picks the highest match. # fpp.bot.1 is already included in fpp.user.* (1-bot default for all players). fpp.bot.1: description: Personal bot limit — 1 active bot at a time. Included in fpp.user.*. default: false # granted automatically via fpp.user.* (default: true) fpp.bot.2: description: Personal bot limit — 2 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.3: description: Personal bot limit — 3 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.5: description: Personal bot limit — 5 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.10: description: Personal bot limit — 10 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.15: description: Personal bot limit — 15 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.20: description: Personal bot limit — 20 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.50: description: Personal bot limit — 50 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.100: description: Personal bot limit — 100 active bots at a time. default: false
# ── Help ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.help: description: View the /fpp help menu. Granted to everyone by default. default: true
# ── Spawn (admin) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Admin spawn ignores personal bot limits entirely. fpp.spawn: description: > Admin spawn — /fpp spawn [amount] [--name <name>]. No personal bot limit. Automatically grants fpp.spawn.multiple and fpp.spawn.name. default: op children: fpp.spawn.multiple: true fpp.spawn.name: true
fpp.spawn.multiple: description: > Spawn more than one bot at a time (/fpp spawn <amount>). Negate to restrict a group to single-bot spawning even with fpp.spawn. default: op
fpp.spawn.name: description: > Use the --name flag to spawn a bot with a custom name. User-tier (fpp.user.spawn) cannot use this — admin only. default: op
# ── Delete ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.delete: description: Delete a fake player by name with /fpp delete <name>. default: op children: fpp.delete.all: true
fpp.delete.all: description: > Delete ALL bots at once with /fpp delete all. Negate to allow individual deletions without mass-wipe access. default: op
# ── List ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.list: description: List all active bots (name, uptime, location, spawner) with /fpp list. default: op
# ── Chat ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.chat: description: Toggle bot fake-chat on/off with /fpp chat [on|off|status]. default: op
# ── Swap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.swap: description: Toggle the bot swap/rotation system with /fpp swap [on|off|status]. default: op
# ── Reload ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.reload: description: Hot-reload all plugin config with /fpp reload. Restrict to trusted admins. default: op
# ── Info (admin) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.info: description: > Full admin database query via /fpp info / /fpp info bot <name> / /fpp info spawner <name>. Shows session history, timestamps, locations, and removal reasons for ALL bots. default: op
# ── Teleport ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.tp: description: > Teleport yourself to any active bot with /fpp tp [botname]. Admin-only. User-tier players cannot use this — grant explicitly if needed. default: op
# ── Bypass ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.bypass.maxbots: description: > Bypass the global max-bots cap in config.yml during /fpp spawn. Grant with care — no upper bound when active. default: op
# ── Migration & Backup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.admin.migrate: description: > Access /fpp migrate — create backups, run config migrations, merge old databases, export session data to CSV, and migrate between SQLite and MySQL backends. Op-only by default. Grant only to trusted server administrators. default: op
# ── Stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.stats: description: > View the /fpp stats panel showing live bot counts, system status, database lifetime statistics, and server TPS. default: op
# ── Freeze ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.freeze: description: > Freeze or unfreeze bots with /fpp freeze <bot|all> [on|off]. Frozen bots are immovable and shown with an ❄ indicator in /fpp list. default: op
# ── Bypass cooldown ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.bypass.cooldown: description: > Bypass the spawn-cooldown delay for /fpp spawn. Automatically granted to admins via fpp.*. default: op

option.name: filePath
option.value: /pom (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>me.bill</groupId> <artifactId>fpp</artifactId> <version>1.2.2</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<name>fpp</name>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> </properties>
<build> <defaultGoal>clean package</defaultGoal> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <release>21</release> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.5.3</version> <executions> <execution> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>shade</goal> </goals> <configuration> <minimizeJar>false</minimizeJar> <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom> <artifactSet> <includes> <include>org.xerial:sqlite-jdbc</include> <include>com.mysql:mysql-connector-j</include> <!-- FastStats is NOT shaded — it is bundled as raw jar resources (src/main/resources/faststats/) and loaded via URLClassLoader at runtime to avoid shade-relocation class-loading issues. --> </includes> </artifactSet> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> <resources> <!-- Regular resources: YAML, properties, etc. — text filtering enabled --> <resource> <directory>src/main/resources</directory> <filtering>true</filtering> <excludes> <!-- Binary jar files must NOT be text-filtered --> <exclude>faststats/**</exclude> </excludes> </resource> <!-- FastStats bundled jars — binary, no filtering --> <resource> <directory>src/main/resources</directory> <filtering>false</filtering> <includes> <include>faststats/**</include> </includes> </resource> </resources> </build>
<repositories> <repository> <id>papermc-repo</id> <url>https://repo.papermc.io/repository/maven-public/</url> </repository> <repository> <id>central</id> <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url> </repository> <repository> <id>placeholderapi-repo</id> <url>https://repo.extendedclip.com/content/repositories/placeholderapi/</url> </repository> <repository> <id>faststats-releases</id> <url>https://repo.faststats.dev/releases</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencies> <!-- Paper public API — the only compile-time dependency needed --> <dependency> <groupId>io.papermc.paper</groupId> <artifactId>paper-api</artifactId> <version>1.21.11-R0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- SQLite JDBC — shaded in for local database fallback --> <dependency> <groupId>org.xerial</groupId> <artifactId>sqlite-jdbc</artifactId> <version>3.47.1.0</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency>
<!-- MySQL Connector — provided by the server or shaded in as fallback --> <!-- If your server doesn't bundle it, change scope to compile --> <dependency> <groupId>com.mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId> <version>8.3.0</version> <scope>compile</scope> <exclusions> <!-- Exclude protobuf to avoid conflicts --> <exclusion> <groupId>com.google.protobuf</groupId> <artifactId>protobuf-java</artifactId> </exclusion> </exclusions> </dependency>
<!-- LuckPerms API system dependency --> <dependency> <groupId>net.luckperms</groupId> <artifactId>luckperms-api</artifactId> <version>5.5</version> <scope>system</scope> <systemPath>${project.basedir}/libs/api-5.5.jar</systemPath> </dependency>
<!-- PlaceholderAPI — soft optional; provides %fpp_count% etc. --> <dependency> <groupId>me.clip</groupId> <artifactId>placeholderapi</artifactId> <version>2.11.6</version> <scope>system</scope> <systemPath>${project.basedir}/libs/placeholderapi-2.11.6.jar</systemPath> </dependency>
<!-- FastStats — anonymous usage analytics (shaded + relocated) --> <dependency> <groupId>dev.faststats.metrics</groupId> <artifactId>bukkit</artifactId> <version>0.18.1</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>dev.faststats.metrics</groupId> <artifactId>core</artifactId> <version>0.18.1</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>me.bill</groupId> <artifactId>fpp</artifactId> <version>1.2.7</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<name>fpp</name>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> </properties>
<build> <defaultGoal>clean package</defaultGoal> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <release>21</release> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.5.3</version> <executions> <execution> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>shade</goal> </goals> <configuration> <minimizeJar>false</minimizeJar> <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom> <artifactSet> <includes> <include>org.xerial:sqlite-jdbc</include> <include>com.mysql:mysql-connector-j</include> <!-- FastStats is NOT shaded — it is bundled as raw jar resources (src/main/resources/faststats/) and loaded via URLClassLoader at runtime to avoid shade-relocation class-loading issues. --> </includes> </artifactSet> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> <resources> <!-- Regular resources: YAML, properties, etc. — text filtering enabled --> <resource> <directory>src/main/resources</directory> <filtering>true</filtering> <excludes> <!-- Binary jar files must NOT be text-filtered --> <exclude>faststats/**</exclude> </excludes> </resource> <!-- FastStats bundled jars — binary, no filtering --> <resource> <directory>src/main/resources</directory> <filtering>false</filtering> <includes> <include>faststats/**</include> </includes> </resource> </resources> </build>
<repositories> <repository> <id>papermc-repo</id> <url>https://repo.papermc.io/repository/maven-public/</url> </repository> <repository> <id>central</id> <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url> </repository> <repository> <id>placeholderapi-repo</id> <url>https://repo.extendedclip.com/content/repositories/placeholderapi/</url> </repository> <repository> <id>faststats-releases</id> <url>https://repo.faststats.dev/releases</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencies> <!-- Paper public API — the only compile-time dependency needed --> <dependency> <groupId>io.papermc.paper</groupId> <artifactId>paper-api</artifactId> <version>1.21.11-R0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- SQLite JDBC — shaded in for local database fallback --> <dependency> <groupId>org.xerial</groupId> <artifactId>sqlite-jdbc</artifactId> <version>3.47.1.0</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency>
<!-- MySQL Connector — provided by the server or shaded in as fallback --> <!-- If your server doesn't bundle it, change scope to compile --> <dependency> <groupId>com.mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId> <version>8.3.0</version> <scope>compile</scope> <exclusions> <!-- Exclude protobuf to avoid conflicts --> <exclusion> <groupId>com.google.protobuf</groupId> <artifactId>protobuf-java</artifactId> </exclusion> </exclusions> </dependency>
<!-- LuckPerms API system dependency --> <dependency> <groupId>net.luckperms</groupId> <artifactId>luckperms-api</artifactId> <version>5.5</version> <scope>system</scope> <systemPath>${project.basedir}/libs/api-5.5.jar</systemPath> </dependency>
<!-- PlaceholderAPI — soft optional; provides %fpp_count% etc. --> <dependency> <groupId>me.clip</groupId> <artifactId>placeholderapi</artifactId> <version>2.11.6</version> <scope>system</scope> <systemPath>${project.basedir}/libs/placeholderapi-2.11.6.jar</systemPath> </dependency>
<!-- FastStats — anonymous usage analytics (shaded + relocated) --> <dependency> <groupId>dev.faststats.metrics</groupId> <artifactId>bukkit</artifactId> <version>0.18.1</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>dev.faststats.metrics</groupId> <artifactId>core</artifactId> <version>0.18.1</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </project>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /wiki-script (snapshot).js

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
